calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2022 Off Calendar

Motion For Leave To File Complaint-In-Intervention
Off Calendar Aug-11-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. JEFFREY M. SOLL, Esq. of Goldman, Magdalin & Krikes LLP (Tel: 818-755-0444) for proposed intervenor Federal Insurance Company;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PROPOSED INTERVENOR FEDERAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Leave To File Complaint-In-Intervention.

The Court notes that appearing counsel did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling, and that there is no one present for the other parties in the case.

The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar. Dismissal of entire action filed on July 14, 2022.
